markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Growth X content program's status, challenges, and path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production is stalled:** Only 6 of a planned \~80 articles are published due to a review bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**New Google Docs workflow:** Brock Walters will clear the \~45-article backlog by Friday, using a new process to accelerate reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Immediate priority shift:** Production will pause on the main backlog to write 6 Linux management articles, leveraging Fleet's internal expertise for rapid review.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [**New feedback tag:** A "Concept" tag will be added for articles requiring a full rewrite, distinct from simple "Accuracy" fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Production Bottleneck

  - [**Goal vs. Reality:** The program is significantly behind schedule (6 published vs. \~80 planned).](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A review bottleneck, as Brock Walters was the sole reviewer and had other priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - **Resolution:** Ashish Kuthiala has made this program Brock's \#1 priority, clearing his other work to focus on the backlog.

### Solution: New Workflow & Backlog Plan

  - [**Process Shift:** Reviews will move from GitHub PRs to Google Docs for efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Backlog Clearance:** Brock will review the entire \~45-article backlog by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Initial Test:** Brock will review 5 articles first to validate the new process before tackling the full list.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Ongoing Cadence:** Growth X will deliver new articles every Wednesday for continuous review.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**Additional Reviewer:** Adrian, a subject matter expert, will also get access to the Google Docs folder to assist with reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Challenge: Content Quality & Strategy

  - [**Quality Issues:** Articles require significant edits, often due to fundamental "Concept" errors (e.g., confusing declarative code with Apple's Declarative Device Management).](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**SEO Rationale:** Similar-sounding titles (e.g., "Apple MDM" vs. "Apple device management") are intentional, targeting distinct, high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Erik O'Brien will provide a list of articles ranked by keyword volume to guide Brock's review order.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)

### New Initiative: Linux Management Content

  - [**Strategic Need:** Fleet's strong Linux management capabilities are a key competitive advantage and entry point into organizations.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [**Project:** Growth X will write 6 articles for a Linux management series.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
      - [**Guidance:** The engine will be trained on 2 already-published articles and outlines from Adrian.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [**Review:** Adrian, Brock, and Alan (internal expert) will provide rapid review.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [**Future Idea:** Explore bundling existing articles into gated assets (e.g., white papers) for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brock Walters:**](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [Review 5 articles in Google Docs to validate the new workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Clear the remaining \~40-article backlog by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien:**](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Provide Brock a prioritized list of articles ranked by keyword volume.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
      - [Grant Adrian and Brock full folder access to the Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Begin writing the 6 Linux management articles, prioritizing them for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
      - [Investigate the feasibility of bundling existing content into gated assets.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [**Ashish Kuthiala:**](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
      - [Confirm Adrian's availability to review the new Linux content.](https://fathom.video/share/_gzeyv_q2yTbhti3LbPxNQyHyC4fv1vn?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
